title: Water Works (Declaration of Water Supply Areas) Order, 2003
title_en: Water Works (Declaration of Water Supply Areas) Order, 2003

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Water Works (Declaration of Water Supply Areas) Order, 2003.

provisions.title: Water supply areas
provisions.content: The areas specified in-the Schedule to this Order are hereby declared to be Water Supply Areas Category C in accordance with sub-regulation (3) of the Water Works Regulation, 1997. Schedule 1. Usangi Water Users Association Mwanga District 2. Kifaru/Kituri Water Users Association Mwanga District 3. Bugilo Water Users Association Kahama District 4. Nemitondo Water Users Association Morogoro Urban 5. Jiloleli Water Users Association Igunga District 6. Malana Water Users Association Hanang District 7. Kiabakari/Nyamisisi Water Users Association Musoma District 8. Masurura Water Users Association Musoma District 9. Ryamesanga Water Users Association Musoma District 10. Mwibagi Water Users Associaton Musoma District 11. Butiama Water Users Association Musoma District 12. Mirwa Water Users Association Musoma District 13. Bumangi Water Users Association Musoma District 14. Nyakatende Water Users Association Musoma District 15. Biatika Water Users Association Musoma District 16. Nyankanga Water Users Association Musoma District 17. Nyamikoma Water Users Association Musoma District 18. Nyakiswa Water Users Association Musoma District 19. Mmazami Water Users Association Musoma District 20. Rusuhi Water Users Association Musoma District 21. Songambele Water Users Association Musoma District History of this document 09 May 2003 this version Published in Gazette of the United Republic of Tanzania 19 Commenced 15 April 2003 Assented to Related documents More documents like this one [] [] [] [] ▲ To the top > Contact us Visit our Twitter/X profile Visit our Linked In profile Visit our YouTube channel About TanzLII TanzLII is operated by the Judiciary of Tanzania and the Office of the Attorney General, Chief Parliamentary Draftsman, and publishes the law of Tanzania for free online access for all.
